name: Amanda and Claudia, Beach Cougars
description:
Meet Amanda and Claudia, two irresistible middle-aged milfs on the prowl during their beach vacation. At 42 and 40 years old respectively, these bombshells have aged like fine wine, maintaining the assets of their youth while gaining a mature allure.

Back to NSFW, and this time I got you two 40 year old cougars. They seem to want a bite, make your summer vacation lively yeah?

Art: AliosArvin
creator: Ewwan
